page: Microsoft Azure E20ds_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor built on the x86_64 architecture. It features 20 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 10 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, running at a base clock speed of 2.8 GHz. The processor includes a 48 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and cryptography acceleration. The system is equipped with 160.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU, and includes 768 GB of local temporary storage with Premium Storage capability.

Performance benchmarks position this instance as a strong performer in memory-bound operations. The Passmark memory score is rated in the top 25%, reflecting efficient memory subsystem throughput. In computational tests, the instance achieves average tier results, including a Geekbench multi-core score of 11082.0 and a multi-core stress-ng CPU score of 19423.75. For specialized workloads, it demonstrates strong performance in text generation for small language models with 135M parameters at 269.68 tokens per second, though performance drops significantly when processing prompts for larger 70B parameter models due to the lack of hardware GPU acceleration.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E20ds_v5 offers a high density of memory and local storage relative to its vCPU count, allowing organizations to run memory-intensive applications without paying for unneeded processing cores. This resource balance makes the instance highly suitable for relational database management systems, in-memory caching layers like Redis, data analytics, and software compilation tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure E20ds_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 20 dedicated vCPUs and 160.0 GB of RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor running at 2.8 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this instance includes 768 GB of local temporary storage and supports Premium Storage. It delivers strong memory performance, as evidenced by a top-25% Passmark memory score, alongside average compute capabilities across standard benchmarks. The high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core provides qualitative cost efficiency for memory-heavy workloads, avoiding the need to over-provision compute resources. The instance is well-suited for database operations, in-memory caching, and software compilation.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E20ds_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 20 vCPUs, 160 GB of RAM, and 768 GB of local storage, delivering strong memory performance for databases and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E20ds_v5 is a memory-optimized VM with 20 vCPUs, 160 GB RAM, and 768 GB local storage, designed for database and memory-heavy workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and local storage for demanding database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: 20 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor at 2.8 GHz
160.0 GB of RAM providing an 8:1 memory-to-vCPU ratio
768 GB of local temporary storage with Premium Storage capability
Strong memory subsystem performance verified by Passmark benchmarks
Optimized for relational databases, in-memory caching, and data analytics
